Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.00).

news_evidence.title: Banking ETFs: How Do KBWB and FTXO Compare to Each Other?
news_evidence.llm_reason: ETF comparison (KBWB vs FTXO) is sector-level and could influence investor flows and sentiment toward large U.S. banks that are constituents of those ETFs (including BAC). However, it's a product/comparison piece without new fundamental news about BAC, so near-term impact is modest.
